docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-03-2006 CONTINUED TO APR-14-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
